log.title: ▶ SYSTEM LOG — GLPI SIM
log.ticket_closed: Ticket validated and closed by the user

toast.desc_min: ❌ The description must be at least 20 characters
toast.fields_red: ❌ Check the fields marked in red
toast.first_asistencia: ℹ️ First go to Assistance → Service Catalog
toast.save_error: ❌ Could not save your progress, please try again

briefing.p_a: The AMADEUS system at counter 13-16 has a
briefing.p_b: : the ATB printers don't respond and agents can't issue boarding passes. You must register a ticket in GLPI 11 following the official procedure.
briefing.item_mission_desc: Create a ticket in GLPI to report the failure in the AMADEUS system
briefing.item_type_desc: Critical failure — direct impact on airport operations
briefing.item_sla_desc: Response time: 5 minutes — Resolution time: 24 hours

login.instruction: Access GLPI using your assigned username and the internal database. Complete the 3 fields correctly.

crear.select_asistencia_hint: Select "Assistance" in the left menu to continue.
crear.amadeus_desc: Ask for support from our helpdesk team.
crear.form_opened: ✅ Form opened! Proceed to the next step to fill it out.

campos.instruction: Complete the Reporte_Amadeus form with the correct data for the counter 13-16 incident at NLU.
campos.type_hint: 💡 Failure in an existing system = Incident
campos.inctype_hint: 💡 Serious interruption affecting operations = Critical failure
campos.desc_placeholder: Explain what happened, what you were doing when the error occurred...
campos.sent_sub: Your form has been submitted successfully.

seguimiento.instruction_b: to see your tickets. Click the active ticket to see its detail.
seguimiento.r1_sub: Airline reports ATB printer not responding
seguimiento.detail_desc: NLU-COUNTER 13,16-CK-REPORT / Airline reports the ATB printer doesn't print. AMADEUS system unresponsive on all counter instances.
seguimiento.support_msg: Case assigned. Technician on the way to the counter. ETA: 15 minutes.
seguimiento.validation_q: The technician has marked this ticket as Resolved. Was the problem completely solved?
seguimiento.fb_fail: ⚠️ Remember: Rejecting reopens the ticket and the technician must keep working. Only reject if the problem persists.
seguimiento.fb_ok: ✅ Correct. By approving, the ticket is permanently closed. The support cycle completes successfully.

q1.q: Q1 · 🚨 An airline check-in system fails completely. Passengers can't board. What type of incident is it and what is the response time?
q1.ok: ✅ A critical failure has High impact: 5 min to respond and 24 hrs to resolve.
q1.fail: ❌ Failures that directly interrupt operations are "Critical failure" with High impact — 5 minutes.

q2.q: Q2 · 🎫 When creating a ticket in GLPI, what is the correct navigation path from the main menu?
q2.ok: ✅ The official path is: Assistance → Service Catalog → Reporte_Amadeus.
q2.fail: ❌ The correct path is Assistance → Service Catalog → Reporte_Amadeus.

q3.q: Q3 · 🏢 An Aeromexico operator reports the system prints duplicate invoices at domestic gates. What do you select in "Reported by"?
q3.ok: ✅ Since an airline operator is reporting, you must select "Airline" → Aeromexico.
q3.fail: ❌ Since an airline operator is reporting, you must select "Airline" → Aeromexico.

q4.q: Q4 · 📋 The technician marked your ticket as "Resolved" but the problem persists. What should you do?
q4.a: Approve the solution and create a new ticket
q4.b: Reject the solution with a comment — the ticket will reopen automatically
q4.c: Contact the supervisor without doing anything in GLPI
q4.d: Wait for the technician to contact you again
q4.ok: ✅ Rejecting the solution reopens the ticket so the technician can keep working.
q4.fail: ❌ If the problem persists, you must reject the solution with a comment.

completion.sub: You've completed the GLPI 11 training module — Airport Help Desk
